stemHtml: At the beginning of a flight, the pilot initiates the FMS. He/she confirms the current aircraft type and model, and wants to go into the sub-menu of the performance database to change a few parameters. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: An aircraft engineer must be present when the pilot is changing parameters, due to the safety critical data.
options.b: Only parameters related to the engine power output can be changed by the pilot.
options.c: Only parameters related to the fuel consumption can be changed by the pilot.
options.d: The performance database can only be changed by maintenance personnel.
